features.title: Free Forever

features.title: Privacy Guaranteed

faqs.question: Is URL Encoder really free?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every feature of URL Encoder on DevToolKit is 100% free with no hidden charges, trials, or subscriptions.

faqs.question: Do you store or look at my inputs?
faqs.answer: Never. All inputs, text, files, and outputs are handled locally inside your web client. We value privacy and store nothing on our backend.

faqs.question: Does it work on mobile phones?
faqs.answer: Yes, our user interface is designed responsively to adapt perfectly to mobile screens and browsers.

faqs.question: How accurate is the URL Encoder?
faqs.answer: It is highly accurate. Conforms to standard RFC URI scheme mappings.

faqs.question: Are there any usage limits?
faqs.answer: No, you can run conversions, validations, or generation tasks as many times as you like. No limit.

faqs.question: Do I need to download desktop software?
faqs.answer: No install required. URL Encoder is built purely with web standards and runs live inside your browser.

faqs.question: Is there a file upload size limit?
How can I report a bug or request a feature?
faqs.answer: Feel free to use the Contact page form from the footer quick links. We check suggestions daily!
